state.next-action:
Phase 42 SHIPPED 2026-04-13 (8 of 9 punch list items). Evolution loop is live end-to-end: candidate → proto-skill → skill pipeline with gad-quick-skill (dot-agent wrapper) drafting and gad-evolution-validator (advisory) checking each draft. Full `gad evolution status|validate|promote|discard` CLI plus the skills infrastructure. Smoke-tested against a real candidate (phase-14-eval-framework-escape-the-dungeon-tracin): drafter wrote a proto-skill, validator caught real issues, status distinguished stages, discard cleanly removed the proto-skill. Pipeline works.
The evolutionary domain vocabulary is LOCKED (decision gad-151): species / generation / brood / evolution / DNA / spawn. Projects remain the top-level marketable unit; species live inside projects. All user-facing copy must use these terms going forward. Findings doc captures the full experimental writeup that drove the architecture decisions (evals/FINDINGS-2026-04-13-evolution-loop-experiment.md).
Phase 43 (domain rename + project/species schema unification) is the next planned phase. Phase 44 (Unity-Asset-Store-style project marketplace) follows. Phase 45 (full site rebrand around the evolutionary vocabulary) closes the arc — explicitly confirmed by the user as a first-class deliverable, not a parked idea.
=== SHIPPED (phase 42 batch, 2026-04-13) === - lib/evolution-validator.cjs — advisory checker engine, writes VALIDATION.md - bin/gad.cjs — new `evolution` subcommand with status/validate/promote/discard - sdk/skills/gad-quick-skill/SKILL.md — universal wrapper around dot-agent's create-skill - sdk/skills/gad-evolution-evolve/SKILL.md — orchestrator for the 3-stage pipeline - sdk/skills/gad-evolution-validator/SKILL.md — advisory validator skill - site/scripts/compute-self-eval.mjs — emits raw CANDIDATE.md instead of SKILL.md stub - skills/candidates/ — 14 regenerated in new CANDIDATE.md format - skills/proto-skills/ — new directory (stage 2 of the pipeline) - site/app/planning/ — Proto-skills tab added next to Candidates tab - site/components/landing/nav/nav-shared.ts — System group uses nested subGroups - site/components/landing/nav/NavDesktop.tsx — DropdownMenuSub for nested rendering - site/components/landing/nav/NavMobileMenu.tsx — inline nested labels on mobile - site/app/findings/page.tsx — restored /findings route for framework-level findings - evals/FINDINGS-2026-04-13-evolution-loop-experiment.md — the experiment writeup - site (2026-04-11): committed missing modules for Vercel — EvalFilterSurface, run-detail/* + lib/run-detail-shared + lib/run-process-metrics-runtime-label, project-market band components (task 28-02). Root cause was merged imports without `git add` of new paths.
=== DECISIONS (phase 42 batch) === GAD-D-151: Evolutionary domain vocabulary — species/generation/brood/evolution/DNA/spawn GAD-D-152: Two-stage evolution pipeline — candidate → proto-skill → skill GAD-D-153: Raw candidate input beats curated INTENT — curator is a filter GAD-D-154: Two-tier skill creators — gad-quick-skill (default) and gad-skill-creator (high-stakes) GAD-D-155: Validator is advisory, not blocking GAD-D-156: Evolutions gate on zero pending proto-skills (human review gate) GAD-D-157: System nav uses four submenus (Internals/Catalog/Reference/Engage) GAD-D-158: Phase 45 rebrand is confirmed direction GAD-D-159: Magicborn per-project nav scoping is a pending design decision
=== NEXT === 1. Execute phase 43 — domain rename + project/species schema unification (depends on phase 42 ✓) 2. Execute phase 44 — Unity-Asset-Store-style project marketplace (depends on phase 43) 3. Execute phase 45 — full site rebrand around the evolutionary vocabulary (depends on phase 44) 4. Resolve GAD-D-159 — pick the magicborn site config schema location (3 options in oneoff/OVERNIGHT-NOTES.md) 5. Validator v2 fix (small, ~10 lines): dedup file refs with overlapping path prefixes in lib/evolution-validator.cjs extractFileRefs 6. Run the first REAL evolution end-to-end (let gad-quick-skill actually draft from one of the 14 pending candidates, review the proto-skill, decide promote/discard) 7. Surface framework findings on the /findings page as they're authored
=== OPEN QUESTIONS (for next session) === 1. Magicborn config schema location — per-project gad-config.toml [site] table, standalone magicborn/.planning/site.toml, or top-level monorepo [docs.projects.<id>.site]? 2. Validator v2 fix — its own commit or rolled into next phase 42-adjacent work? 3. The phase-14 proto-skill sketch from the smoke test was discarded — worth saving as a starting point for later, or let the next real evolution regenerate it from scratch?
=== SELF-EVAL (latest) === 4,308 events | 229 tasks (203 done) | 147 decisions Framework overhead: 21.3% | Loop compliance: 42% Candidates (stage 1): 14 | Proto-skills (stage 2): 0
